user_query: Search OneDrive for Excel files and read the content of the first two found.

plan.query: Search OneDrive for Excel files and read the content of the first two found.
plan.reasoning: The task requires searching for Excel files in OneDrive and reading their content. A single step can handle both the search and reading operation by specifying the desired content retrieval in the search command.

steps.task: Search OneDrive for Excel files and retrieve the content of the first two files found.

plan.synthesis: Return the content retrieved from the first two Excel files found in OneDrive.

invoked_agents.input: Search OneDrive for Excel files and retrieve the content of the first two files found.
